title: GS1 Invoice
description: Invoice document (Factura). Legal fiscal representation of the transaction. Covers three sub-types: INVOICE (standard factura), CREDIT_NOTE (Nota de Crédito — reduces a prior invoice), and DEBIT_NOTE (Nota de Débito — increases a prior invoice). Includes the Three-Way Match correlation triangle (related_order + related_asn), multi-currency fiscal_totals_ves block for SENIAT compliance, and optional fiscal_control for Unidigital talonario digital. Credit/Debit Notes require the related_documents array. / Documento de factura. Cubre tres subtipos: INVOICE (factura estándar), CREDIT_NOTE (reduce una factura previa) y DEBIT_NOTE (aumenta una factura previa). Las Notas de Crédito/Débito requieren el arreglo related_documents.

doc_type.description: INVOICE: standard fiscal invoice ('Factura'). CREDIT_NOTE: reduces a prior invoice amount — issued when goods are returned, price adjustments are granted, or billing errors are corrected. DEBIT_NOTE: increases a prior invoice amount — issued for missed charges, price corrections, or additional quantities. Both CREDIT_NOTE and DEBIT_NOTE require the related_documents array to be present. / INVOICE: factura fiscal estándar. CREDIT_NOTE: reduce una factura previa (devoluciones, ajustes de precio, correcciones). DEBIT_NOTE: aumenta una factura previa (cargos omitidos, correcciones de precio). Ambos requieren el arreglo related_documents.

document_number.description: Unique document number. Use prefix 'INV-' for invoices, 'CN-' for credit notes, 'DN-' for debit notes. / Número de documento único. Use prefijo 'INV-' para facturas, 'CN-' para notas de crédito, 'DN-' para notas de débito.

related_order.description: References the ORDER_CONFIRMED document_number. Part of Three-Way Match triangle: Order = Receipt = Invoice. For Credit/Debit Notes, this references the same order as the original invoice. / Referencia al document_number de la ORDER_CONFIRMED. Parte del triángulo Three-Way Match. Para Notas de Crédito/Débito, referencia la misma orden que la factura original.

related_asn.description: References the DESPATCH_ADVICE document_number. Completes the Three-Way Match triangle. / Referencia al document_number del DESPATCH_ADVICE. Completa el triángulo Three-Way Match.

related_documents.description: Required for CREDIT_NOTE and DEBIT_NOTE: array of the original invoices being corrected. Enforces strict historical linking required by SENIAT auditing and Unidigital talonario digital. Each entry must include the original invoice number, emission date, and total amount. / Requerido para CREDIT_NOTE y DEBIT_NOTE: arreglo de las facturas originales que se están corrigiendo. Garantiza el vínculo histórico exigido por el SENIAT y Unidigital.

status.description: Invoice status. ISSUED is the initial status when invoice is emitted. VOIDED is used for Credit/Debit Notes that are themselves subsequently corrected. / Estado de la factura. ISSUED es el estado inicial al emitir. VOIDED se usa para Notas que a su vez son corregidas.

currency_base.description: Base currency for all commercial line items. / Moneda base para todas las líneas comerciales.

issued_at.description: Invoice issue date/time. / Fecha/hora de emisión de la factura.

due_date.description: Payment due date. Calculated as issued_at + net_days. / Fecha de vencimiento del pago.

biller.description: The party issuing the invoice (typically the laboratory). RIF is mandatory on all fiscal documents. / El participante que emite la factura (típicamente el laboratorio).

payer.description: The party responsible for payment (buyer/distributor). / El participante responsable del pago (comprador/distribuidor).

ship_to.description: Final delivery destination (may differ from payer for drop-ship scenarios). / Destino final de entrega (puede diferir del pagador en escenarios de drop-ship).

payment_terms.description: Invoice payment terms. Should match the ORDER_CONFIRMED payment_terms. / Condiciones de pago de la factura.

exchange_rate_pegged.description: BCV exchange rate at time of invoicing. Used as the denominator for all VES conversions in fiscal_totals_ves. / Tasa BCV al momento de facturar. Usada como denominador para todas las conversiones VES.

lines.description: Invoice line items. Each line must reference the corresponding ORDER_CONFIRMED line. For Credit/Debit Notes, line quantities represent the adjustment (not the full original qty). / Líneas de la factura. Para Notas de Crédito/Débito, las cantidades representan el ajuste, no la cantidad original completa.

invoiced.description: Quantity being invoiced or adjusted. For Credit Notes this is the returned/credited quantity. For Debit Notes this is the additional quantity or charge quantity. / Cantidad facturada o ajustada. Para Notas de Crédito es la cantidad devuelta/acreditada. Para Notas de Débito es la cantidad adicional o de cargo.

unit_price.description: Final agreed unit price (from ORDER_CONFIRMED). / Precio unitario final acordado (de la ORDER_CONFIRMED).

taxes.description: Tax lines for this invoice line. IVA-exempt medicines must have is_exempt=true to prevent incorrect VES tax calculations. / Líneas de impuesto para esta línea de factura.

line_total_net.description: Net line total in base currency (unit_price × invoiced_qty - discounts). / Total neto de línea en moneda base.

summary.description: Invoice totals. fiscal_totals_ves is extracted by the Government Observer Node for SENIAT Targeted Tax Manifest. / Totales de la factura. fiscal_totals_ves es extraído por el nodo observador del gobierno para el Manifiesto Fiscal Objetivo del SENIAT.

fiscal_totals_ves.description: SENIAT reporting block. ONLY this object is sent to the Government Observer Node — never the line items. / Bloque de reporte SENIAT. SOLO este objeto se envía al nodo observador del gobierno, nunca las líneas de detalle.

fiscal_control.description: Optional SENIAT talonario digital control block. Include to activate Unidigital fiscal printing workflow. Omit for international/non-fiscal B2B transactions. / Bloque opcional de control del talonario digital SENIAT. Incluir para activar flujo de impresión fiscal Unidigital.

applied_payments.description: Payments captured at time of invoicing (if not already captured in ORDER_CONFIRMED). Same structure as order applied_payments. / Pagos capturados al momento de facturar (si no se capturaron en la ORDER_CONFIRMED).
